safest_plan.entry_basis: 9M + BB demand band / 'SPOT PLAY' zone on the 2026-06-09 macro chart (~21), where price is now sitting after the breakdown; the deeper green demand on the 2026-06-15 4h chart sits just under at ~20. This is the structure-supported accumulation entry, NOT a chase.

targets.basis: Prior supply / red line ~27 on the 2026-06-15 4h chart; matches the 2026-03-23 grade's 26.50–27.00 first target
Internal supply / partial-profit zone on the 2026-06-09 macro chart; the 2026-03-23 grade's 32+ thesis
0.886 'TP level — pay close attention' band on the 2026-06-09 macro chart

safest_plan.stop_basis: A close below the 9M + BB demand band and the labelled 19.34 level (shown on both the 2026-06-15 4h and 2026-06-09 macro charts). For the spot thesis the final deep invalidation is the 1W BB ~15.26, but a sustained close under 19.34 already breaks the accumulation structure.

stance_by_source.summary: A member already bought MOS, saying they were following Zero's spot setup.
The monthly demand zone melted into resistance and price is breaking down toward 20-21; Zero says only add on a 'flip' — i.e. wait for a daily close back above 24.49 before buying. Not a chase.
Long-term spot accumulation in the low 20s, holding for 32, 40, 48 and 51.50, with a bonus stretch to 67-82; deep invalidation around 15.
Marks weekly demand below price at ~19-21 and ~16-18; explicitly 'doesn't want' the higher zone — patient, waiting for deeper support.
Earlier buy 23.50-24.50 monthly demand, scaling, targets 26.50-27 then 32+, invalid on a close below 22.50 — that level has since broken, so this leg is stale.

conflicts: The community member bought on 23 Jun following 'Zero's spot setup', but Zero's own 15 Jun note says to add only on a flip — a daily close back above 24.49 — which has not happened, so the member is early relative to Zero's own trigger.

The older 23 Mar buy zone (23.50-24.50, invalid below 22.50) has been overtaken: the 15 Jun chart shows the monthly demand 'melted into supply' and 22.50 already broke, so that tactical long is no longer valid.

The newer macro chart is bullish for the long-term spot hold (low 20s up to 51+), while the newest tactical chart shows the structure breaking down first toward 20-21 — agreement on eventual direction, but a real disagreement on whether NOW is a buy.
The extracted 'above 224-226 resistance' is a misread of the on-chart price box (~22.71); MOS trades in the low 20s and the real resistance/target band is ~24-27 — corrected from the image.
plain_english: Everyone agrees Mosaic is a long-term 'buy the dip and hold' idea, with room up to roughly 32, 40, 48 and beyond if it works. But the most recent chart shows the support it was sitting on has just broken and flipped into resistance, so the price is falling toward the 20-21 area, and Zero himself says to wait for the stock to close back above 24.49 before adding. One member jumped in early; the patient play is different. Don't chase it down here: wait either for that 24.49 reclaim, or for the price to steady in the 20-21 support band, and only then accumulate on a spot (no-leverage) basis.
